scenes.name: Refugees at the Gate
scenes.summary: The survivors of Mordov arrive with mud, blood, and news of an army of dead.

beats.summary: Learn the scale and source of the undead threat.

scenes.name: Ill Tidings
scenes.summary: The town council argues over whether to flee, fight, or attempt something more desperate.

beats.summary: Persuade the council toward a strategy for survival.

scenes.name: Night of the Dead
scenes.summary: Fog, dead hands, and stitched horrors descend on Shadowgrange under Rinelda's direction.

beats.summary: Prevent the horde from overrunning the village outright.
